name: Noble Development Public Company Limited
summary: Noble Development Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, develops and sells real estate properties in Thailand. The company offers construction, rental and service, and construction consulting services. Its properties comprise land plots, single detached houses, townhouses, and condominium units. In addition, the company provides project management and after housing delivery services. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
